heading: Eligibility for service of individual currently serving as Administrator of NASA
label: 18443 Eligibility for service of individual currently serving as Administrator of NASA
text: The individual serving in the position of Administrator of the National Aeronautics and Space Administration as of , comes from civilian life and is therefore eligible to serve in such position, in conformance with .October 11, 2010section 20111 of title 51
notes: CodificationIn text, “” substituted for “section 202 of the National Aeronautics and Space Act of 1958 ()” on authority of , , , which Act enacted Title 51, National and Commercial Space Programs.section 20111 of title 5142 U.S.C. 2472(a)Pub. L. 111–314, § 5(e)124 Stat. 3443Dec. 18, 2010
